questions.question: Agents and managers cannot create knowledge articles from Community questions.
questions.explanation: 根据ServiceNow CSM的知识管理系统规则，代理和经理不能直接从社区问题创建知识文章。社区问题通常需要经过审核和验证流程才能转化为正式的知识文章。这些问题的创建权限被限制在特定的角色和工作流程中，以确保知识库的质量和一致性。因此该陈述是正确的。

questions.question: Information about a customer’s service contract is found in Knowledge.
questions.explanation: 关于客户的服务合约信息并不是存储在知识库（Knowledge）中的。服务合约信息通常被存储在客户账户、权利或相关的业务实体中。知识库主要用于存储常见问题解答、故障排除指南和产品信息等公共知识资源。因此该陈述是错误的。

questions.question: From what places in SN can an agent create a case? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 在ServiceNow中，代理可以从多个地方创建案例，包括客户服务应用（Customer Service Application）、联系人（Contact）记录和账户（Account）记录。这些位置都提供了直观的界面和上下文信息来创建和管理案例。聊天（Chat）通常用于沟通而不是案例创建的主要入口。

questions.question: What are the conditions that matching rules are based on? (Choose two.)

options.text: Agent resources best suited to work on a case
Filters set up in advanced work assignment

questions.explanation: 匹配规则的条件基于两个主要方面：首先是代理资源的最佳匹配条件，即根据代理的技能、可用性和专长来匹配；其次是特定的案例属性，如类别、优先级、产品类型等。这两个条件共同确保案例被路由到最合适的代理或团队。

questions.question: Matching rules enhance assignment capability by ____________________.

options.text: Providing dynamic matching of cases to groups or individuals
Determining if account is a customer or partner

questions.explanation: 匹配规则通过根据代理的可用性来匹配最佳代理，增强了分配能力。虽然匹配最佳代理是一个功能，但这不是匹配规则的主要目的。匹配规则的核心是提供动态的案例到团队或个人的匹配，这是它增强分配能力的关键方式。因此答案应该强调动态匹配的能力。

questions.question: Special Handling Notes can apply to which one of the following based on specific attributes?
questions.explanation: 特殊处理注释（Special Handling Notes）可以基于特定属性应用于联系人记录。这允许系统根据联系人的特定特征（如VIP状态、优先级等）自动应用特殊的处理指示。这种功能有助于确保重要或特殊客户得到适当的关注和处理。

questions.question: Predictive Intelligence improves Case management by:

options.text: Predicting what values should have gone into empty fields in historical records
Reducing the number of records needed to accurately predict a value
Predicting Case values without manual intervention

questions.explanation: 预测智能通过预测案例值而无需人工干预，改进了案例管理。这个功能使用机器学习算法来自动填充案例字段，如优先级、类别和分配组，基于历史数据和模式。这大大提高了效率并减少了人工配置的需求。

questions.question: Which of the following is a condition for matching rules?
questions.explanation: 匹配规则的条件是特定的案例属性，如案例类别、优先级、产品类型等。这些属性被用来定义规则如何自动将案例路由到合适的代理或团队。代理域不是匹配规则的条件，而是一个独立的概念。

questions.question: What do blue circles in the timeline of a case form represent?
questions.explanation: 案例表单时间线中的蓝色圆圈代表案例状态的变化。这些圆圈用于可视化标记案例生命周期中的关键状态转换点。每个蓝色圆圈都对应一个特定的状态变化事件，帮助用户追踪案例的进展。

questions.question: Predictive Intelligence improves triage quality by eliminating the guesswork. Predictive Intelligence supports which of the following decisions? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 预测智能通过消除猜测，改进分类质量。它支持案例分类和案例优先级决策，这两个功能是预测智能的关键应用。案例分类帮助自动标记案例类型，而案例优先级则自动设置紧急程度，两者都提高了分类的准确性。

questions.question: Which Business Rules are part of the Customer Service Management baseline configuration? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 自动评估（Auto Assessment）和更新案例权利（Update Case Entitlement）是客户服务管理基线配置的一部分。这些业务规则在标准CSM实施中自动执行，用于自动化案例评估流程和管理客户的服务权利。

questions.question: What are the Critical Success Factors that are related to CSM Suite Implementations? (Choose four.)

options.text: Have a clear understanding of the use cases
Define the number of hours needed to develop the associated requirements
Implementation is only as good as the underlying process

questions.explanation: CSM套件实施的关键成功因素包括：定义业务痛点，为实施提供明确的方向；提供一致的客户服务，确保用户体验；清晰理解用例，确保解决方案与需求相符；以及实施的质量取决于底层流程。这些因素共同确保实施的成功。

questions.question: What should be emphasized when designing solutions? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 在设计解决方案时，应该强调最小化定制、关注开箱即用的功能和设计可扩展性。这些原则确保了解决方案的可维护性、升级能力和长期成本效益。最小化定制可以减少维护成本，开箱即用的功能可以加快实施，而可扩展性设计则确保系统能够适应未来的增长。

questions.question: What role does the Engagement Manager play before the Workshop? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 在研讨会之前，参与度经理扮演中介的角色，在客户和实施团队之间充当沟通桥梁；同时协助处理技术要求，确保实施的技术方面得到适当的关注和支持。这两个角色对于有效的前期准备至关重要。

questions.question: What should be part of the pre-engagement collateral?

options.text: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) and pricing sheet

questions.explanation: 前期参与的附带资料应该包括范围指南（Scoping Guide），它定义了实施的边界和预期的交付成果。常见问题、客户服务角色模板和SKU定价表通常是实施过程中的补充资料，而不是核心的前期参与资料。

questions.question: Articles can provide the following: (Choose three.)

options.text: Provide answers and responses to common issues or questions

questions.explanation: 文章可以提供多个功能：记录当前和已知问题，为常见问题或问题提供答案和响应，以及分享产品信息。这些功能使知识库成为自助支持的强大工具，可以减少支持工作量并改进客户体验。

questions.question: Contextual Search framework is used for providing Knowledge search results in which of these scenarios?

options.text: Both portal question entry and Record Producer

questions.explanation: 上下文搜索框架用于在门户问题输入和记录生成器这两种场景中提供知识搜索结果。这个框架能够根据上下文信息（如案例类别、优先级等）来智能地过滤和排列搜索结果，提高搜索的相关性和效率。

questions.question: Which of the following are true regarding integrating a ServiceNow Knowledge base with external content? (Choose two.)

options.text: Imported external articles appear as attachments in ServiceNow
Only applications that allow WebDAV connections can be integrated
The imported article will have the same category it had in the source knowledge base

questions.explanation: 关于将ServiceNow知识库与外部内容集成，以下是正确的：导入的外部文章在ServiceNow中显示为附件；只有允许WebDAV连接的应用程序才能被集成。这两点说明了ServiceNow如何处理外部内容的集成和兼容性要求。

questions.question: Access to a Knowledge base or Article can be restricted based on a customer's assets and the product models using which of the following? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 知识库或文章的访问权限可以基于客户的资产和产品型号使用以下方式限制：知识产品权利（Knowledge Product Entitlements）允许根据客户拥有的产品进行限制；用户条件（User Criteria）允许定义更细粒度的访问规则。这两种方法共同提供了灵活的访问控制机制。

questions.question: What are some benefits that Knowledge Product Entitlement provide? (Choose three.)

options.text: Makes it easier for Agents to manage case volume
Allows access to Knowledge Articles that are related to products owned by a customer

questions.explanation: 知识产品权利的好处包括：减少呼叫量，通过让客户自助访问相关知识来降低支持成本；使代理更容易管理案例量，通过提供快速的参考资料；允许访问与客户拥有的产品相关的知识文章，确保客户只看到相关的内容。这些好处共同提高了支持效率和客户满意度。

questions.question: What are the characteristics of Knowledge Categories?

options.text: Shareable across KBs: Yes ; Multi-Level: No
Shareable across KBs: No ; Multi-Level: Yes
Shareable across KBs: No ; Multi-Level: No
Shareable across KBs: Yes ; Multi-Level: Yes

questions.explanation: 知识类别的特点是：不可跨知识库共享（Shareable across KBs: No），但支持多级结构（Multi-Level: Yes）。这意味着类别是特定于每个知识库的，但可以组织成分层的结构来更好地组织和导航知识内容。

questions.question: Users with the sn_customerservice.proxy_contact role can do which of the following? (Choose two.)

options.text: Manage cases on behalf of customer service agents
Create cases on behalf of customers
Manage requests on behalf of customer service agents
Create requests on behalf of customers
Manage major incident communication on behalf of a customer service manager

questions.explanation: 具有sn_customerservice.proxy_contact角色的用户可以代表客户创建案例，并代表客户创建请求。这个角色允许代理或支持人员在客户无法直接访问系统时代表他们提交和管理请求。

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Catalog Item variable?

options.text: Grants the customer the opportunity to ask a question
Opens a wizard to help a customer fill in a case form
Guides a customer by providing hints on case forms
Allows the customer or consumer to qualify their answer

questions.explanation: 目录项变量的目的是允许客户或消费者有资格获得他们的答案。这些变量在目录表单中用于根据客户输入动态调整可用选项或流程，确保客户看到与其特定需求相关的内容。

questions.question: What one of the following is optional when creating a Catalog workflow?
questions.explanation: 在创建目录工作流时，批准工作流是可选的。发布工作流、定义工作流活动和管理工作流版本都是创建和维护工作流的必需步骤。批准流程通常是一个配置选项，可以根据组织的需求启用或禁用。

questions.question: What module is used to create Case Record Producers?
questions.explanation: 用于创建案例记录生成器的模块是记录生成器（Record Producers）。这个模块提供了一个用户友好的界面来定义和配置记录生成器，特别是为客户服务管理创建案例记录生成器。它是ServiceNow中创建此类自动化工具的标准模块。

questions.question: Which one is NOT a dependency for the Customer Service Plugin?
questions.explanation: Customer Service Plugin 的依赖项包括 Task Activities、Skills Management 和 Openframe，这些都是必需的组件。Communities 不是其依赖项，是独立的功能模块。因此，Communities 不是依赖项，答案是 D。

questions.question: ACME corporation wants to use ServiceNow CSM for supporting their customers through Twitter. What CSM entity would you recommend ACME to store the customer's Twitter profile details?
questions.explanation: ServiceNow CSM 中存储客户社交媒体资料的专门实体是 Social Profile。这个实体设计用于存储和管理客户的各种社交媒体账户信息，包括 Twitter、Facebook 等。Account、Consumer 等都不是存储社交资料的适当场所，Personnel File 更不是。

questions.question: Which social media channels are NOT available out-of-box?
questions.explanation: ServiceNow CSM 开箱即用支持 Facebook 和 Twitter 社交媒体频道。LinkedIn 不在开箱支持的范围内，需要额外的配置和集成工作才能使用。因此答案是 C，表示 LinkedIn 不可用。

questions.question: What is the equivalent of NOT selecting any group, when configuring multiple active configurations of OpenFrame?
questions.explanation: 在配置 OpenFrame 的多个活跃配置时，不选择任何群组的等效含义是选择所有群组。这意味着 OpenFrame 将对所有群组用户开放访问，与不限制群组范围相同，使其对整个组织可用。

questions.question: How many outbound email accounts are supported in Customer Service Management?
questions.explanation: 在 Customer Service Management 中，只支持一个出站电子邮件账户。这是系统设计的限制，确保了统一的电子邮件管理、追踪和审计。所有出站电子邮件都必须通过这一个配置的账户发送。

questions.question: What are features of Customer Service Management? (Choose four.)
questions.explanation: CSM 的主要功能包括 Service Entitlements（服务权限/资格）、Real-time SLAs（实时SLA）、Service Contracts（服务合同）和 Skills-based routing（基于技能的路由）。Timed Audits 和 Demand Management 不是 CSM 的标准功能，Service Prospecting 也不在列表中。

questions.question: What are the Forum User Types? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 论坛用户类型包括 Registered（已注册用户）、Public（公开用户）和 Custom（自定义用户类型）三种。Admin 是系统角色而不是论坛用户类型，Moderator 是权限设置而非用户类型分类。这些类型定义了不同用户在社区论坛中的访问权限和功能。

questions.question: Which of the following are true regarding the Community Portal application? (Choose two.)

options.text: It is available to any customer with a Community license
It is available by default with the Support and Service portals
It is only available to CSM license holders
Most of the configuration does not require System Administrator role

questions.explanation: Community Portal 可供任何有 Community 许可证的客户使用（答案 A），而且大部分配置不需要系统管理员角色即可完成（答案 D）。它不是默认包含在 Support 和 Service 门户中的，也不仅限于 CSM 许可证持有者。

questions.question: If only one user reports a content for moderation, the content will be hidden.
questions.explanation: 在 Community 中，仅当单一用户报告内容进行审核时，该内容不会被立即隐藏。需要达到特定的报告阈值（通常是多个用户的报告）才能自动隐藏内容。系统要求一定数量的报告来防止滥用。因此答案是 B（False）。

questions.question: The available case types are: (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: CSM 中可用的案例类型是 Order（订单）和 Product（产品）。Product Support 和 Support 不是 CSM 中的标准案例类型分类。这两种类型允许客户创建不同性质的支持请求和管理案例。

questions.question: What is required to enable the Follow the sun field on the Customer Service Case form?

options.text: Nothing, it is a standard field
The value property on the form must be set to true
The plugin 'com.snc.csm_time_recording' needs to be activated
The value property on the form must be set to true and the field added to the case form

questions.explanation: 要在 Customer Service Case 表单上启用 Follow the sun 字段，需要同时满足两个条件：1) 必须将表单的 value 属性设置为 true；2) 还需要将该字段添加到案例表单中。仅设置属性而不添加字段，或仅添加字段而不设置属性都不足以启用此功能。

questions.question: In the Customer Service Management space, what does the term asset management mean?

options.text: Financial, contractual and inventory information of assets
A set of business activities and processes used to track assets
Tracking products or services customers are using

questions.explanation: 在 CSM 语境中，资产管理是指跟踪客户正在使用的产品或服务。它关注客户持有和使用的具体资产及其生命周期，而不仅仅是财务或库存信息。这是客户关系管理和服务支持的核心部分。

questions.question: Which of the following roles cannot update a consumer's record?
questions.explanation: sn_customerservice_agent 角色无法更新消费者记录。只有具有更高权限的 sn_customerservice_manager、sn_customerservice.consumer_agent 和 admin 角色拥有更新消费者记录的权限。这是基于角色的访问控制的设计。

questions.question: Major Issue Management uses which one of the following capabilities?
questions.explanation: Major Issue Management 使用 Targeted Communications（定向通信）功能。这个功能允许组织向受重大问题影响的特定客户群发送有针对性的通知、更新和信息。它有助于改善沟通和客户满意度。

questions.question: What is required to synchronize fields from a parent to a child case(s)?

options.text: The advanced plugin (com.sns.pa.customer_service_advanced) needs to be activated
Major Issue Management needs to be installed and certain properties enabled
No action required, this is a standard Customer Service Management feature
The role of sn_customerservice.customer_case_manager must be assigned

questions.explanation: 要实现从父案例到子案例的字段同步，需要安装并启用 Major Issue Management 并配置相关属性。这不是标准的 CSM 功能，需要特定的插件和配置。高级插件虽然有帮助，但具体答案指向 Major Issue Management 需要被安装和属性启用。

questions.question: Which of the following functions can be completed when using the Field Service Management Application on a mobile device offline? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 在移动设备上离线使用 Field Service Management 应用时，可以完成的功能包括：Execute assigned tasks（执行分配的任务）、Close work orders（关闭工单）和 Manage assets（管理资产）。Manage requests 和 Manage cases 需要实时连接才能同步数据。

questions.question: Information in the Case Field 'Contact' is copied to which Incident Field?
questions.explanation: Case 表单中的 Contact 字段信息会被复制到关联的 Incident 表单的 Caller 字段。这是 CSM 和 ITSM 集成的一部分，用于保持联系人信息和事件起票人信息的一致性和对应关系。

questions.question: How many active OpenFrame configurations can you have on an instance?
questions.explanation: 一个 ServiceNow 实例可以有无限数量的 OpenFrame 活跃配置。这提供了灵活性和可扩展性，允许组织为不同的客户群体、业务单位或使用场景配置多个独立的 OpenFrame 实例。

questions.question: What are common types of application record data that are imported during a CSM data migration? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: CSM 数据迁移期间导入的常见应用程序记录数据包括 Knowledge Article（知识文章）和 Accounts（账户）。Chat 和 Case 通常不在标准迁移范围内，因为它们通常是活动数据或需要特殊处理。

questions.question: Which are the key self-service functions of the Customer Support Portal? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Customer Support Portal 的关键自助服务功能包括 Community（社区）、Knowledge Base（知识库）和 Service Catalog（服务目录）。'Open An Incident' 不是开箱即用的自助功能，因为这需要通过 Case 系统而非 Incident。

questions.question: Which of the following are channels? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 在 CSM 中，频道（Channel）包括 Web 和 Chat。Contacts 是客户实体而非频道，Article 是内容类型而非交互频道。Web 和 Chat 是客户与组织交互的主要通信渠道。

questions.question: Out-of-the-box, the consumer support portal (/csp) CANNOT be used for which one of the following actions?
questions.explanation: 消费者支持门户（/csp）开箱即用支持查看知识文章、进行实时聊天和消费者自注册，但不支持 'Open an incident'（打开事件）功能。开启事件需要额外的配置或与事件管理系统的集成。

questions.question: The Customer Support Portal default configuration provides the following channels to interact with customers? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Customer Support Portal 默认配置提供的交互频道是 Chat（聊天）和 Email（电子邮件）。Web 和 Social 不是默认包含的频道，虽然可以通过额外的配置和许可来添加这些频道。

questions.question: The ServiceNow Communities feature is only available for customers with ServiceNow Customer Services Management licenses.
questions.explanation: The ServiceNow Communities feature is available for customers with various license types, not exclusively CSM. Community features enable knowledge sharing and peer support across the platform.

questions.question: Read the use case below to determine if the customer service relationship is B2B or B2C. Mary Contrary experiences a power outage and calls the electrical company. The agent determines the outage is local to the customer and scheduled a technician to Mary's house.
questions.explanation: This is a B2C (Business-to-Consumer) relationship because the electrical company is providing direct service to an individual consumer (Mary) at her home.

questions.question: If the CSM Demo Data Plugin has been installed what are two options either of which will prepare that instance to be used as part of the release path to production? (Choose two.)

options.text: Remove the Demo Data via a HI Request
Clone back to this instance from a valid instance

questions.explanation: To prepare a demo instance for production use, you can either remove demo data via an HI Request or clone from a valid production instance to ensure clean data.

questions.question: What criteria can be used to determine when a new inbound case should be opened?

options.text: When a new customer is created
When a customer has a question or issue to resolve
When we have new marketing material for a customer

questions.explanation: New inbound cases should be opened when a customer has a question or issue that requires resolution, as this is the core purpose of case management.

questions.question: From a service provider's perspective, is the following a product or an asset? A cable modem model that the service provider sells.
questions.explanation: A cable modem model that a service provider sells is a product because it is an item offered for sale, distinct from assets the provider owns and manages.

questions.question: Entitlements specify the level of service provided to customers.
questions.explanation: Entitlements specify the level and type of support services provided to customers based on their service contracts and license agreements.

questions.question: Partner admin contacts have access to the data of both their partner accounts and customer accounts.
questions.explanation: Partner admin contacts have full access to both their partner account data and the associated customer account data for account management purposes.

questions.question: What are the three main components that make up Proactive Customer Service Operations?
questions.explanation: The three main components of Proactive Customer Service Operations are the Service-Aware Install Base, Service-Aware CMDB, and proactive monitoring capabilities.

questions.question: Which of the following are best practice with regard to data imports? (Choose two.)

options.text: When importing to multiple instances import to each instance separately.
Use ServiceNow automatic functionality to clean the data after it is in ServiceNow tables rather than in the legacy repository.
Ensure the field data lengths in ServiceNow are adequate for the imported data because ServiceNow does not automatically adjust the length.
Images embedded in Knowledge Articles should be uploaded separately.

questions.explanation: Best practices for data imports include ensuring adequate field data lengths and uploading embedded Knowledge Article images separately for proper content management.

questions.question: What does viewing a customer's install base enable customer service agents to do? (Choose two.)

options.text: See the detailed configurations of the products and services deployed for a customer to determine the action needed
Monitor alerts for operational services and configuration items that affect service health
Trace information provided in a case to the right product or service to which it relates
Identify an upsell of related products and services not yet purchased by a customer

questions.explanation: The install base view enables agents to see deployed product configurations and identify related products or services that could address customer needs (upsell opportunities).

questions.question: Cost Information on cases is available as part of the Performance Analytics Content Pack for Customer Service.
questions.explanation: Cost Information on cases is not included as part of the standard Performance Analytics Content Pack for Customer Service.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Guided Decisions capability?

options.text: Provide agents with an escalation guide
Dynamically guide agents to help resolve complex cases
Provide agents with a knowledge guide

questions.explanation: Guided Decisions dynamically guides agents through workflow decisions and processes to help resolve complex customer cases more efficiently.

questions.question: Which feature enables you to quickly identify high-priority tasks based on multiple dimensions, not just by a single field value like priority?
questions.explanation: Case Spotlight is the feature that enables quickly identifying high-priority tasks by evaluating multiple dimensions and criteria, not just a single priority field.

questions.question: During which Now Create stage are workshops conducted?
questions.explanation: In the NOW Create methodology, workshops are conducted during the Plan stage to gather business requirements and design solutions.

questions.question: Which application must be activated to enable customers to check in online for future appointments?
questions.explanation: The Walk-Up Experience application must be activated to enable customers to check in online for future scheduled appointments.

questions.question: What are some of the influencing factors that will help determine the type of customer support desk structure required? (Choose four.)

options.text: Knowledge and skills required for agents
Number and type of support tools available
Number of customer service portals used

questions.explanation: Support desk structure is influenced by agent knowledge and skills, customer geography, languages spoken by agents, and the total number of agents needed.

questions.question: What is the default value in the Channel field when a new case is opened by a customer in the Service Catalog, using the Customer Service Portal?
questions.explanation: When a case is opened through the Service Catalog portal, the default value in the Channel field is Web.

questions.question: An entitlement defines the types of support a customer receives. Entitlements are based on a number of standard fields such as product and asset. When Proactive Customer Service Operations is implemented which additional fields could be used?
questions.explanation: When Proactive Customer Service Operations is implemented, Install base Item becomes an additional field that can be used as entitlement criteria.

questions.question: When activating the Customer Service Management Demo Data plugin, which case type is available besides product case?
questions.explanation: When activating the Customer Service Management Demo Data plugin, Order case type is available as an option besides the standard Product case type.

questions.question: What's the purpose of the Deactivate Special Handling Notes Scheduled Job?

options.text: Runs at the end of the month and deactivates all Special Handling notes more than 30 days old
Runs weekly and must have the Active checkbox unchecked in order for Special Handling notes to be deleted by the end of the week
Runs on demand by the System Admin who must set specific weekly schedules and set only those that are priority 1-critical to be deactivated
Runs daily at midnight, checks all active alerts and sets the status to Expired for those that have reached their expiration dates

questions.explanation: The Deactivate Special Handling Notes job runs daily at midnight and marks alert status as Expired for those that have reached their expiration dates.

questions.question: What does the Agent Whisper function do?

options.text: Lets agents and chat supervisors have a conversation without the requester knowing
Lets the chat supervisors have a conversation with the requester without the agent knowing
Lets agents have chat conversations with other agents without the requester knowing
Lets agents and requesters have a conversation without the chat supervisor knowing

questions.explanation: The Agent Whisper function allows agents and chat supervisors to have private conversations without the customer or requester being aware of it.

questions.question: Upon self-registration through the Consumer Service Portal, a record is created in: (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Upon self-registration through the Consumer Service Portal, records are automatically created in both the Consumer User and Consumer tables.

questions.question: Who can create a customer service case from a community discussion? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Customer service agents and proxy case creators are the roles that can create a customer service case from a community discussion.

questions.question: The assignment workbench uses configurable matching criteria to evaluate agents in a selected group and provide an overall ranking. What are the different types of criteria available for the assignment workbench? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: The assignment workbench uses three types of matching criteria: Scripted criteria, Simple Match criteria, and Aggregate criteria for evaluating and ranking agents.

questions.question: Asset classes are defined to allow for logical grouping of assets. There are five asset classes provided to group assets, each Asset class provides unique functionality for that group of Assets in the platform. Which of the following are the asset classes used? (Choose five.)
questions.explanation: The five asset classes used in the platform are Hardware assets, Facility assets, Software licenses assets, Enterprise Software assets, and Consumables assets.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes how the CSM application uses the Asset table?

options.text: CSM uses the Product table instead of the ITSM Asset table
CSM uses the Product Model table instead of the ITSM Asset table
ServiceNow uses the same Asset table for both CSM and ITSM, however CSM has a different subset offields
Because CSM Assets are managed differently from ITSM Assets ServiceNow uses different Asset Tablesfor CSM than it does for ITSM

questions.explanation: CSM应用程序与ITSM应用程序共享同一个Asset表，但CSM应用程序对该表的字段设置了不同的访问限制。CSM只显示与其功能相关的特定字段子集，而不使用完全不同的Asset表。这种设计方式使ServiceNow能够在两个应用程序间保持数据一致性，同时为每个应用程序提供特定的数据视图。答案是C：ServiceNow uses the same Asset table for both CSM and ITSM, however CSM has a different subset of fields。

questions.question: A consumer service agent receives and accepts a case which was created by a consumer. The agent needs and requests more information from the consumer. After receiving the information, the agent proposes a solution that is accepted by the consumer. Given this scenario, what is the chronological order of case states used to manage this case?

options.text: New > Work in Progress > On Hold > Work in Progress > Resolved > Closed
New > Open > Work in Progress > Solution Proposed > Closed
Open > Pending > Work in Progress > Resolved > Closed
New > Open > Awaiting Info > Open > Resolved > Closed

questions.explanation: 根据题目描述的场景：案例创建（New）→ 代理接受（Open）→ 需要更多信息（Awaiting Info）→ 获得信息后继续处理（Open）→ 提出解决方案（Resolved）→ 关闭案例（Closed）。这是CSM案例管理的标准生命周期流程，体现了从创建到解决再到关闭的完整过程。正确答案是D：New > Open > Awaiting Info > Open > Resolved > Closed，反映了案例在需要更多信息时的状态变化。

questions.question: What are the types of matching criteria for Customer Service? (Choose four.)
questions.explanation: 在CSM的匹配标准中，系统可以基于多个因素来分配工作。包括：匹配技能（A）、上次分配的代理（B）、分配的案例数量（E）和当天的可用性（F）。这些标准帮助确保工作项被分配给最合适的代理，提高效率和客户满意度。认证（C）和距离（D）等因素不是标准匹配条件，合作伙伴工作时间（G）也不适用于CSM场景。

questions.question: Which roles are considered external?
questions.explanation: 在ServiceNow CSM中，外部角色是指授予外部用户（客户和消费者）的角色。客户服务代理（sn_customerservice_agent）和消费者支持代理（sn_customerservice.consumer_agent）被视为外部角色（C、D），因为它们用于支持外部客户和消费者交互。而合作伙伴管理员和客户管理员通常被视为特定的管理角色而非标准外部角色。

questions.question: What is a supported external customer that, in turn, sells to and supports one or more customers?
questions.explanation: Partner（合作伙伴）是被支持的外部客户，它反过来向一个或多个其他客户销售和提供支持。这定义了B2B合作伙伴关系模型，其中合作伙伴既是ServiceNow的客户，又是其他客户的服务提供者。这种双重身份使合作伙伴能够在管理自身支持需求的同时为其他客户提供服务。

questions.question: Customer Service Trending Topics is a capability that enables companies to use Predictive Intelligence to quickly pinpoint factors driving up case volume and act to mitigate them. Which of the following would be a benefit of using Predictive Intelligence Customer Service Trending Topics?

options.text: Eliminate the need for more traditional performance analytics
Auto-generate clusters of cases that point to similar underlying issues
Create root cause solutions for similar cases
A guaranteed reduction in call volume per month

questions.explanation: CSM的Predictive Intelligence Trending Topics功能的主要优势在于能够自动生成相似基础问题的案例集群。通过使用AI和机器学习技术，系统可以识别多个案例背后的共同主题和问题。这不是消除传统分析（A错），也不能创建根本原因解决方案（C）或保证减少呼叫量（D），而是自动聚类以发现模式。

questions.question: Which ServiceNow applications can be integrated out-of-the-box with CSM? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: ServiceNow CSM可以与服务组合管理（Service Portfolio Management - A）、项目管理（Project Management - B）和ITOM事件管理（ITOM Event Management - E）进行开箱即用的集成。这些集成允许CSM与其他ServiceNow应用程序无缝协作，增强功能和数据共享能力。DevOps（C）和Risk Management（D）不是标准的开箱即用集成。

questions.question: Which of the following are benefits that may be gained from using communities? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 社区的主要好处包括：降低支持成本（Reduce support costs - A）、增进与客户的互动（Engagement with Customers - B）和获取产品反馈（Get product feedback - C）。通过建立社区，组织可以利用客户知识，减少支持工作量，同时收集宝贵的产品改进建议。减少销售成本（D）和增加营销有效性（E）虽然可能，但不是核心好处。

questions.question: Which of the following are benefits that may be gained from using communities?
questions.explanation: 这道题的正确答案是D（减少每次销售成本 - Reduce cost per sales）。注意选项B有拼写错误（"Cu stomers"应为"Customers"）。虽然社区有多个好处，但这道题特别强调的是与销售相关的成本减少。相比题83，这道题是单选题，答案侧重于商业成本效益。

questions.question: What is a case?

options.text: An individual record that handles and resolves incidents for external customers
An individual record that is used to identify and create automation opportunities
An individual record that is used to identify and resolve a question or issue for an external customer
An individual record that handles and routes issues for internal users

questions.explanation: 在CSM系统中，案例（Case）是用于识别和解决外部客户的问题或疑问的个人记录（C）。案例是CSM的核心功能，用于管理客户请求、问题和需求，从创建到解决的完整生命周期。与事件（Incidents）不同，案例专门针对外部客户，而不是内部用户的问题。

questions.question: External content integration is important for agents to be able to access knowledge articles from external sources. ALL external sources must be:
questions.explanation: 外部内容集成要求所有外部知识源必须符合WebDAV标准（WebDAV-compliant - C）。WebDAV（Web分布式创作和版本控制）是一个HTTP扩展，允许用户远程编辑和管理web服务器上的文件。这确保了外部内容可以与ServiceNow CSM安全集成和同步。WebDAV版本化（A）和Web可配置性（B）不是硬性要求。

questions.question: An Account Relationship is based on a defined account relationship type. Users with the System Administrator role can define two types of relationships: (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 账户关系（Account Relationship）有两种主要类型：账户对账户关系（Account-to-account - C）和合作伙伴对账户关系（Partner-to-account - E）。这些关系类型使系统能够定义不同组织实体之间的层次结构和依赖关系，支持复杂的B2B场景管理和数据关联。

questions.question: Which knowledge records can be configured with User Criteria?
questions.explanation: 用户标准（User Criteria）可以在知识库（Knowledge Base）和文章（Article）级别配置（D）。通过这种方式，管理员可以控制特定用户或用户组对知识内容的访问权限，实现知识的有针对性分发。这种灵活的访问控制机制确保用户只看到与其相关的知识内容。

questions.question: When the virtual agent plugin is installed NLU is activated but is not available for use until what two configurations are completed? (Choose two.)

options.text: In the NLU Settings configure the Intent confidence threshold
In the NLU Settings configure the Entity confidence threshold

questions.explanation: 当虚拟代理插件安装时，NLU（自然语言理解）被激活但需要两个配置才能使用：选择NLU服务提供商（A）和启用虚拟代理中的NLU功能（C）。这两个步骤是使NLU功能完全可操作所必需的初始配置。配置Intent和Entity置信度阈值（B、D）是高级配置，不是基本要求。

questions.question: An entitlement defines the types of support a customer receives. Entitlements are based on a number of standard fields such as product and asset. When Proactive Customer Service Operations is implemented which additional fields could be used? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 在实施主动客户服务运营时，可以使用的额外字段包括安装基础项目（Install base item - D）和销售产品（Sold product - E）。这些字段与标准的产品和资产字段结合，使权限系统能够更精细地控制和个性化支持，特别是在跟踪客户拥有的资产和产品时。

questions.question: When implementing Knowledge Product Entitlements, what is enabled when activating the Enable access control of Knowledge Articles system property?

options.text: Allows access to knowledge articles based on customer’s security access
Allows access to knowledge articles that are related to entitlements owned by a customer
Allows access to multi-product line knowledge articles
Allows access to knowledge articles that are related to products owned by a customer

questions.explanation: 启用知识文章访问控制（Enable access control of Knowledge Articles）系统属性后，允许基于客户拥有的产品访问相关的知识文章（D）。这实现了与知识产品权限相关联的细粒度访问控制，确保客户只能查看与其购买或拥有的产品相关的知识内容，提高了知识库的相关性和安全性。

questions.question: Advanced Work Assignment assigns work to agents based on their availability, capacity, and skills. Agent Affinity enhances the Advanced Work Assignment process by adding additional agent details organized by affinity type. Which of these are affinity types? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 在Agent Affinity中，亲缘类型包括：账户团队责任（Account team responsibility - B）、历史性（Historical - C）和相关任务（Related task - D）。这些亲缘类型帮助系统在进行工作分配时，优先考虑与特定代理相关的历史交互、账户关系和任务相关性，实现更智能的工作分配。

questions.question: In Agent Workspace Chat, Agents have the ability to use quick actions to work more efficiently. What action does the /r quick action perform?

options.text: Rejects an incoming chat and moves it automatically to the “General” queue
Routes the chat towards another group
Uses response templates to insert as text in a conversation
Rolls up the current chat history towards an existing case

questions.explanation: 在Agent Workspace Chat中，/r快速操作用于使用响应模板将文本插入对话（C）。这个功能使代理能够快速选择预定义的回复模板，提高响应效率和一致性。这对于处理常见问题和提供标准化回复非常有用。

questions.question: Name a security benefit gained from using scoped applications:

options.text: Prevents changes to tables without explicit permission from IT
Limits accessibility to other applications in the instance
Limits the number of update sets that can be applied

questions.explanation: 使用范围应用程序（scoped applications）的安全好处是限制了对实例中其他应用程序的可访问性（C）。范围应用程序通过应用程序边界和隔离，确保应用程序内的数据和功能不会暴露给其他应用程序，提高系统整体安全性和数据隐私保护。

questions.question: In case management, Parent Child Synchronization allows for which of the following:

options.text: Synchronization of all child cases as well as children of child cases on all levels
Child cases to be separated from Parent cases and will not be synchronized automatically
Parent cases to automatically generate child cases when all fields are filled out thus, synchronized auto- population
Enabling the Customer Service agent to create cases so that all the children cases can be managed bymanaging the parent case

questions.explanation: 父子同步（Parent Child Synchronization）允许当所有字段填完时，父案例自动生成子案例（C）。这是一个同步的自动填充机制，使系统能够根据父案例的详细信息自动创建对应的子案例，简化案例管理流程，提高工作效率。

questions.question: The CSM application has a feature that can be used to filter records in CSM-related tables which are accessible by users with CSM roles. This feature makes it unnecessary to create business logic for those personas to access the data. What is this feature?
questions.explanation: CSM查询规则（CSM Query Rules - A）是CSM应用程序中的一个功能，用于根据CSM角色过滤可访问的记录。这种声明式的访问控制机制消除了为每个CSM角色手动编写业务逻辑的需要，简化了访问控制的实现和维护。

questions.question: In Advanced Work Assignment, what does the overflow assignment capability do, if defined?

options.text: When one support group reaches capacity the work item is automatically routed to another group
Uses matching and assignment rules to send work items to the agent with the highest availability
Routes cases to different groups based on their skill set and availability
Uses matching and assignment rules to send work items to the agent with the most capacity

questions.explanation: 在Advanced Work Assignment中，溢出分配（overflow assignment - A）功能可以确保当一个支持组达到容量限制时，工作项会自动路由到另一个组。这保证了工作的持续分配和最优的资源利用，防止某个组过载而其他组闲置。

questions.question: In Workspace Chat, agents have the ability to use quick actions to work more efficiently. What action does the /r quick action perform?

options.text: Routes the chat towards another group
Uses response templates to Insert as text in a conversation
Rolls up the current chat history towards an existing case
Rejects an incoming chat and moves it automatically to the general queue

questions.explanation: 在Workspace Chat中，/r快速操作用于将当前聊天历史卷入现有案例（C）。这个功能允许代理将聊天记录转换为正式案例记录，便于案例追踪、管理和知识积累。与csm.93不同，这里/r是指"roll up"而非"response"。

questions.question: Which role must B2B and B2C customers obtain, at a MINIMUM, to access a ServiceNow instance?
questions.explanation: B2B和B2C客户必须获得External（snc_external）角色才能访问ServiceNow实例（A）。这是ServiceNow中允许外部用户访问系统的最小权限角色，是所有外部用户访问的基础。没有这个角色，外部用户无法在系统中进行任何操作。

questions.question: Which Flow Designer flow can be used to automatically close resolved cases if customers do not respond within a specified time?
questions.explanation: Auto Close Resolved Cases（自动关闭已解决案例）Flow Designer流可用于自动关闭已解决的案例，如果客户在指定时间内未做出回应（B）。这个自动化流程有助于提高案例管理效率和及时结案，减少长期未结案例的堆积。

questions.question: What role can be assigned to employees who are not fulfillers, such as those in sales and services, or do not have other CSM-specific roles, but have a need to create cases on behalf of customers?
questions.explanation: Proxy Contact role (sn_customservice.proxy_contact) is designed for employees who are not fulfillers but need to create cases on behalf of customers. This role grants the necessary permissions without providing full fulfiller access.

questions.question: Proactive Customer Service Operations works with Event Management to proactively monitor and fix issues affecting customers. It can also trigger case workflows and enable organizations to notify customers whose services or products are impacted by an outage or issue. What are the three main components that make up Proactive Customer Service Operations? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: The three main components of Proactive Customer Service Operations are: Service-Aware Install Base (provides visibility into customer assets), Proactive Case (enables automated case creation), and Service Monitoring (tracks service health and issues).

questions.question: Which roles are considered external? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: External roles in CSM include Customer Admin (sn_customerservice.customer_admin) and Partner Admin (sn_customerservice.partner_admin). These roles are granted to users outside the organization who need to manage customer-related activities.

questions.question: The default configuration automatically closes resolved Cases after how many days?

options.text: Cases are not automatically closed by default

questions.explanation: By default, ServiceNow CSM does not automatically close resolved cases. Organizations must manually configure auto-closure rules if they want this behavior implemented.

questions.question: What do blue circles in the timeline of a case form represent?
questions.explanation: Blue circles in the case timeline represent state changes. These visual indicators help agents quickly identify when a case status has been modified, making it easier to track the case progression.

questions.question: What are the different resource matching methods on the Matching Rule form? (Choose four.)
questions.explanation: The four resource matching methods are: Scripted (uses custom business logic), Advanced (uses complex queries), Simple (uses basic field matching), and Selection Criteria (allows manual selection). History and Skill are not standard matching methods.

questions.question: Which of the following child case states would cause parent-child case synchronization to fail? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Parent-child case synchronization will fail when a child case is in Resolved, Closed, or Cancelled states. These terminal states prevent proper synchronization with the parent case as they indicate case completion.

questions.question: External customers can view the problem, change, and request records associated with their customer service cases from the Customer and Consumer Service Portals. Which of the following can they approve in relation to cases via the portals?
questions.explanation: External customers can approve Change Records and Request Records through the portal. This allows them to have visibility and control over changes and requests that affect their services.

questions.question: Playbooks for CSM provide step-by-step guidance for resolving specific types of customer service cases. What are the three out-of-the-box playbooks for CSM? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: The three out-of-the-box CSM playbooks are: Case playbook for Onboarding (guidance for new customer setup), Case playbook for Product Support (guidance for product issues), and Case playbook for Complaints (guidance for handling complaints).

questions.question: Based on which out-of-box attributes can Special handling Notes be applied to cases? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Special handling notes can be applied to cases based on Product, Account, and Contact attributes. These notes provide contextual information to agents about special requirements or considerations for specific products, accounts, or contacts.

questions.question: As an agent you can report a knowledge gap, if you cannot find relevant articles that could help resolve a case. Which action is required to create the knowledge gap?

options.text: Document the knowledge gap in the case work notes and escalate the case
Post a question in one of the various Customer Service Management knowledge bases
Use Related Links on the case form to report a knowledge gap
Use the Create Knowledge button on the case form to report a knowledge gap

questions.explanation: To report a knowledge gap, agents use the Related Links on the case form. This allows them to document areas where knowledge articles are missing, helping the knowledge management team identify and create needed content.

questions.question: What feature does the Product Model and Catalog Items Relationship plugin enable?

options.text: Agents are automatically proposed catalog items related to the chosen product on the case form
Consumers can track what products they have purchased via the catalog
It provides a contextual service catalog based on the customer’s subscribed services
Customer service managers can track the financial cost of customer’s subscribed services and therelated requests

questions.explanation: The Product Model and Catalog Items Relationship plugin provides a contextual service catalog based on the customer's subscribed services. This enables agents to propose relevant catalog items to customers based on their specific product subscriptions.

questions.question: What happens to a case whenever the state of one of the associated IT Service Management records (incident, problem, change) is updated?

options.text: The case escalates to an assignment group as defined in the default escalation template
The case work notes are updated automatically
The case action status changes to Related Task Updated
The case displays a special handling note highlighting the update

questions.explanation: When the state of an associated ITSM record is updated, the case work notes are automatically updated. This ensures that agents have visibility into related ITSM activity and can see the impact of updates on their cases.

questions.question: Application Scoping from a security perspective brings the following benefits: (Choose two.)

options.text: Improves instance security by limiting access to other applications on the instance
Scoped applications prevent versioning for complex instances
Scoping hold the records and acts as a container for the desired CSM applications
Scoped applications limits autonomy and control of all aspects of the CSM application

questions.explanation: Application Scoping provides two key security benefits: First, it improves instance security by limiting access to other applications on the instance. Second, scoping holds records and acts as a container for the desired CSM applications, providing isolation and control.

questions.question: How can multiple service catalogs be made available on the Customer Service Portal?

options.text: Include them in the list of service catalogs on the Customer Service Portal record
Add them to the list of service catalogs in the Customer Service Portal header widget options
Only the Customer Service service catalog can be used on the Customer Service Portal
Create user criteria for each of the applicable service catalogs

questions.explanation: Multiple service catalogs are made available on the Customer Service Portal by including them in the list of service catalogs on the Customer Service Portal record. This configuration allows different customers to see relevant catalogs based on their needs.

questions.question: Now Create provides a prescriptive methodology, leading practices, and accelerators to help with ServiceNow implementations and upgrades. How many sequential project phases and exit gates are there in the Now Create Methodology?
questions.explanation: The Now Create Methodology includes five sequential project phases and exit gates. These gates ensure quality and readiness before progressing to the next phase of a ServiceNow implementation or upgrade.

questions.question: From which one of the following can an agent create a CSM Case?
questions.explanation: Agents can create CSM cases from Chat. This integration enables agents to convert chat conversations with customers into formal case records for proper tracking and management.

questions.question: Using the out-of-the-box major issue management process flow, a consumer service agent proposes an existing case in the Open state as a major case candidate. The major case candidate has a consumer defined and is approved by the customer service manager. What happens to the major case candidate?

options.text: The major case candidate becomes a major case
A new major case is created and the major case candidate is added as a child to the major case
The major case candidate requires an approval from the major issue manager
The major case candidate is closed and a new major case is created

questions.explanation: When a major case candidate is approved by the manager, a new major case is created and the major case candidate is added as a child to the major case. This relationship enables proper tracking and management of the major issue and its associated cases.

questions.question: What types of escalation templates can be created? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Two types of escalation templates can be created: Case escalation templates (for escalating cases to assignment groups) and Account escalation templates (for escalating at the account level). These provide different scoping options for escalation rules.

questions.question: What are the recommended good practices when running implementation workshops? (Choose three.)

options.text: Give the customers the data they need so they can make an informed decision
Any financial implication of a decision should be handled by the delivery and sales team
Enforce customers to adapt their processes towards the baseline processes
Engage with customers to gain deep understanding of their organization
Guide the customer toward industry best practices

questions.explanation: Recommended practices for implementation workshops include: giving customers the data they need to make informed decisions, engaging with customers to understand their organization deeply, and guiding customers toward industry best practices. These practices ensure successful implementations that align with customer needs.

questions.question: What is the specific type of catalog item called that allows users to create task-based records, such as case records, from the Service Catalog?
questions.explanation: A Record Producer is the specific type of catalog item that allows users to create task-based records such as cases from the Service Catalog. This enables self-service case creation through the catalog interface.

questions.question: Out-of-box, which functionality handles state transitioning for case management?
questions.explanation: State Flows handle state transitioning for case management in CSM. This functionality manages the workflow of case states and ensures that cases follow the proper state progression according to configured rules.

questions.question: Which of the following are benefits of customer access management? (Choose two.)

options.text: It defaults the responsibility for access management to the customer service agent.
It increases security by automatically providing access to case information based on account hierarchy
It increases automation by automatically granting access to cases based on access to sold product
It improves the customer experience by enabling related parties to track and collaborate on cases.
It defaults the responsibility for access management to the customer.

questions.explanation: Two key benefits of customer access management are: it increases automation by automatically granting access to cases based on access to sold products, and it improves the customer experience by enabling related parties to track and collaborate on cases.

questions.question: What are the advantages of leading indicators over lagging indicators? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: The advantages of leading indicators over lagging indicators are: they are prospective (forward-looking, allowing for proactive action) and easy to influence (can be changed or improved through current actions). Lagging indicators are retrospective and harder to influence after the fact.

questions.question: Customer Service Management Administrators can delegate Contact Administration activities to specific contacts within accounts by assigning specific roles to one or more users. Which of the following roles, if assigned, would allow the user to create contacts?
questions.explanation: The Customer Admin role (sn_customerservice.customer_admin) allows users to create contacts. This role grants the necessary permissions for contact administration activities within customer accounts. Note: The original typo 'customer_admln' should be corrected to 'customer_admin'.

questions.question: What is knowledge article versioning?

options.text: A content tracker for knowledge articles
The ability to manage and track article updates

questions.explanation: Knowledge article versioning is the ability to manage and track article updates throughout their lifecycle. This allows organizations to maintain version control, manage revisions, and track changes over time. Answer is C.

questions.question: Service providers use business models to support their various customers. What type of customer is supported with the Business-to-Consumer (B2C) model?
questions.explanation: The B2C (Business-to-Consumer) business model is designed to serve individual consumers, as opposed to B2B which serves other businesses. Answer is A - Individuals.

questions.question: When configuring email in Communication Channels, how many outgoing email addresses are supported?
questions.explanation: In ServiceNow CSM Communication Channels configuration, only one (1) outgoing email address is supported. This ensures clear and controlled email communication from the system. Answer is A - One.

questions.question: Which of the following roles have permission to create a relationship between a contact and an account? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Only customer service managers and admins have permission to create relationships between contacts and accounts. These are the two roles that possess sufficient permissions. Answers are D (sn_customerservice_manager) and E (admin).

questions.question: In CSM, Asset Management has a different meaning than in ITSM or Corporate Finance. Which of the following defines Asset Management in CSM?

options.text: The process of developing, operating, maintaining, upgrading, and disposing of assets in me most cost- effective manner
A generic activity or process responsible for tracking and reporting the value and ownership of assetsthroughout their lifecycle
Asset management has different use cases for tracking specific products or services customers are using
It includes all of the data crucial to support customers as efficiently as possible

questions.explanation: In CSM context, Asset Management refers to tracking specific products or services that customers are using, which is different from ITSM's IT focus or Corporate Finance's asset valuation focus. Answer is C.

questions.question: What is KCS (Knowledge Centered Services)?

options.text: A bunch of tables strictly pertaining to CSM case articles that focus on mapping articles to Knowledgemanagement
A documented methodology to provide a set of best practices for creating and maintaining knowledge
A dashboard with specific visualization of the different knowledge bases and categories
An application that helps agents and managers to create cases from Knowledge articles

questions.explanation: KCS (Knowledge Centered Services) is a documented methodology that provides a set of best practices for creating, capturing, and maintaining knowledge. It focuses on continuous improvement of knowledge and its utilization. Answer is B.

questions.question: When creating or importing assets for CSM, model categories are used to: (Choose three.)

options.text: Define whether a Configuration Item (CI) is created when an Asset record is created or vice versa
Build a classification structure for product models
Model the configuration options for each product model being sold to customers
Define a link between Asset classes and Configuration Item (CI) classes

questions.explanation: Model categories are used to: 1) Define whether a CI is created when an Asset is created, 2) Group assets together, and 3) Define links between Asset and CI classes. Answers are A, B, and E.

questions.question: Viewing a customer's install base in the CSM Workspaces enables customer service agents to: (Choose two.)

options.text: Close an upsell of related products and services not yet purchased by a customer
See the detailed configurations of the products and services deployed for a customer to determine theaction needed
Trace Information provided in a case to the right product or service to which it relates
Monitor related operational services and configuration items that affect service health

questions.explanation: Viewing install base enables agents to: 1) See detailed product/service configurations to determine necessary actions, and 2) Trace case information to the right products/services. Answers are B and C.

questions.question: Benefits of Proactive Customer Service Operations include: (Choose two.)

options.text: Major cases can be eliminated as there will be no Impact to customers

questions.explanation: Benefits of proactive customer service include reduced inbound call volume and reduced Mean Time To Resolve (MTTR), which improves customer satisfaction and operational efficiency. Answers are A and D.

questions.question: What features are included with the Customer Service Portal? (Choose three.)

options.text: Header with links for different customer activities such as creating a case
Search feature to get information from several repositories
Links to information sources such as the knowledge base, community and customer support
Links to marketing promotions and product coupons
The ability to create new accounts

questions.explanation: The Customer Service Portal includes: 1) Header with links for customer activities like creating cases, 2) Search feature to retrieve information from multiple repositories, and 3) Links to resources like knowledge base, community, and customer support. Answers are A, B, and C.

questions.question: What does NLU stand for?
questions.explanation: NLU is an acronym that stands for Natural-Language Understanding. This is a technology used in AI and chatbots to process and comprehend human language input. Answer is B.

questions.question: Out-of-the-box, cases are automatically closed after how many days?

options.text: Cases are not automatically closed by default

questions.explanation: By default, cases in ServiceNow CSM are NOT automatically closed. They must be manually closed or configured through automation rules. Organizations can customize this behavior based on their business needs. Answer is D.

questions.question: When are any changes to the platform considered a customization?

options.text: When they require an implementation spread across all project phases
If they are NOT applied through the usage of built-in tools on the Now Platform
When they are solely implemented for a custom application
When there are business demands for custom functionality that is not offered out-of-the-box

questions.explanation: A customization is defined as any change to the platform that is NOT applied through the usage of built-in tools on the Now Platform. If you use standard configuration options and built-in tools, it's not a customization. Answer is B.

questions.question: Which solution must be implemented to let a breakdown dashboard appear as a pop-up window on the case form?
questions.explanation: In-form Analytics is the solution that enables breakdowns and dashboards to appear as pop-up windows directly on case forms, providing agents with real-time insights without leaving the form. Answer is B.

questions.question: The case digests feature includes which types of case communication? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Case digests include Case Action Summaries (summaries of actions taken) and Post Case Reviews (reviews conducted after case closure). These help document and communicate case activities. Answers are B and C.

questions.question: By default what can customers with the customer (sn_customerservice.customer) role see on the customer service portal? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Customers with the customer role can view Assets (their purchased products), Publications (knowledge and documentation), and Products (available in their catalog) by default. Answers are A, B, and C.

questions.question: Which feature allows an agent to copy reusable messages to case or task forms to provide quick and consistent messages to users?
questions.explanation: Response Templates allow agents to copy pre-written, reusable messages into case or task forms, ensuring consistent communication with customers while saving time. Answer is C.

questions.question: In the Customer Service Management space what defines the term asset?

options.text: A specific product instance supported for a customer
A product that a company supports
A resource that allows a business service

questions.explanation: In CSM, an asset is defined as a specific product instance that is supported for a particular customer. This is distinct from a product type and refers to the actual instance deployed at the customer's location. Answer is B.

questions.question: Which capabilities does the integration with Microsoft Outlook add-in offer? (Choose two.)

options.text: Escalate a case on the add-m panel of Outlook
Register the sender of an email as contact
As the Microsoft Outlook user, register yourself as self-contributor
Create cases using email content in Outlook for the customer contact

questions.explanation: The Microsoft Outlook add-in offers the ability to register email senders as contacts and create cases using email content in Outlook for the customer contact. Answers are B and D.

questions.question: To which entities can Special Handling Notes be applied out of the box?
questions.explanation: Out-of-the-box, Special Handling Notes can be applied to Consumer entities. These notes provide special instructions or handling requirements for specific consumers/customers. Answer is A.

questions.question: Which service catalogs are available out-of-the-box in the customer portals? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: The two service catalogs available out-of-the-box in customer portals are Customer Service (for customer service requests) and Consumer Service (for consumer/individual service requests). Answers are B and C.

questions.question: Partner admin (sn_customerservice.partner_admin) contacts have access to:
questions.explanation: Partner admin contacts have access to both their customer accounts (to provide support) and their partner accounts (to manage partner relationships and operations). Answer is C - Both.

questions.question: From a security perspective, scoping brings several benefits: (Choose two.)

options.text: Improves instance security by limiting accessibility to other applications on the instance
Provides CSM teams the autonomy and control needed to configure and manage the CSM application, but not the CSM Service Portals
IT can manage and control the pace of the CSM teams because dependencies have been put in place
The scope holds the records and acts as a container for the desired Customer Service Management Applications

questions.explanation: Scoping benefits from a security perspective: 1) Improves instance security by limiting accessibility to other applications, and 2) Acts as a container for the CSM applications. Answers are A and D.

questions.question: Advanced Work Assignment (AWA) pushes work to qualified agents using work item queues, routing conditions, and assignment criteria that you define. Which step would ensure the work was allocated to the appropriate agent?

options.text: Set the Agent Experience (What agents see in their Workspace inbox)
Define Assignment Rules (How to assign work items)
Define Work Item Queues (Where to route)

questions.explanation: To ensure work is allocated to the appropriate agent, you must Define Assignment Rules, which specify how to assign work items to qualified agents based on criteria and conditions. Answer is B.

questions.question: What action can be performed by a Partner Admin (sn_customerservice.partner_admin) and NOT by a Partner (sn_customerservice.partner) in the Customer Service Portal?

options.text: Can view assets belonging to their partner accounts
Can create, view, and edit cases for their partner accounts
Can resolve cases reported by their partner accounts
Can create and update contacts for their partner accounts

questions.explanation: Partner Admins can create and update contacts for their partner accounts, a capability that regular Partners do not have. This allows admins to manage the partner account structure. Answer is D.

questions.question: What is a household entity?

options.text: Group of users that usually share a common address and use services as a group
Group of people that usually share a common address and use services as a group
Group of customers that usually share a common address and use services as a group
Group of consumers that usually share a common address and use services as a group

questions.explanation: 家庭实体（household entity）是指通常共享一个公共地址并将服务作为一个整体使用的消费者群体。该定义强调了它是由消费者（consumers）组成的集合，而不是用户、人员或客户的通用术语。这种分类在客户服务管理中用于识别和管理相关联的客户群体。

questions.question: Why does the implementation team need to deliver core functionality to the customer asquickly as possible?

options.text: To facilitate the requirement gathering during the workshops
To complete any complex customizations early enough
To realize near-term ROI (Return on Investment)

questions.explanation: 实施团队需要尽可能快地向客户交付核心功能，以实现近期投资回报率（near-term ROI）。这种方法使客户能够在完整解决方案准备好之前开始从系统中获得价值，同时也为复杂的定制工作留出足够的时间。快速交付核心功能是实施策略中至关重要的部分。

questions.question: Assignment workbench enables customer service managers to assign tasks to agentsvia configurable criteria known as Matching Rules. Which out-of-the-box configurablecriteria can be used? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 分配工作台支持多个开箱即用的可配置匹配条件：已分配案例数（Assigned Cases）可衡量代理当前的工作量；可用性今天（Availability Today）反映代理在当天的实时可用性；匹配技能（Matching Skills）确保代理具备处理特定案例所需的专业知识。这三个条件共同确保案例被分配给最合适的代理。

questions.question: Regarding Account Teams, what is the purpose of marking a role as 'unique'?

options.text: The role then becomes a child responsibility
Ensure there is a dedicated account manager for that account
The role then becomes a parent responsibility
Prevent the same role being used on different customer accounts

questions.explanation: 在账户团队中，将角色标记为'唯一'的目的是防止同一角色在不同客户账户上被使用。这确保了每个账户的特定角色分配的专一性和一致性，有助于维护清晰的责任划分。

questions.question: Configuration items (CIs) are entities that capture the individual configurations for eachproduct sold to the customer CIs are stored in the configuration management database (CMDB). Assets are specific product instances that are supported for a customer. Whichof the following statements is correct for CIs and assets?

options.text: The contract and entitlements of an asset dictate whether or not it is stored in the CMDB
The CMDB only tracks CIs, assets cannot be CIs
While the CMDB may track some assets as configuration items (CIs) not ALL assets are CIs
The CMDB tracks all assets as configuration items (CIs)

questions.explanation: 虽然CMDB可能将某些资产跟踪为配置项（CIs），但并非所有资产都是CIs。这种区分很重要：CIs代表需要在配置管理中追踪的标准化配置，而资产是指向客户销售和支持的特定产品实例。不是所有销售给客户的产品实例都需要作为CIs进行配置管理。

questions.question: Which of the following statements is correct when the 'Contact Local Time' field isenabled in a case form?

options.text: The field is not based of the customers profile time zone
The field is active in the base form
The field is always based on the system time zone
Agents can use the field to identify if it is the right time to contact customer

questions.explanation: 启用'Contact Local Time'字段时，代理可以使用该字段来识别当前是否是与客户联系的合适时间。该字段显示客户所在地区的本地时间，帮助代理在考虑到时区差异的情况下与客户沟通，从而提高联系的成功率和客户满意度。

questions.question: Which of the following roles can update a consumer's record? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 消费者支持代理（Consumer Support Agent）和客户服务经理（Customer Service Manager）这两个角色可以更新消费者的记录。这些角色具有必要的权限来修改消费者的信息和相关数据，以支持服务交付和客户关系管理。

questions.question: Which CSM Configurable Workspace feature enables agents to quickly view records inthe contextual side panel without switching tabs?
questions.explanation: 动态关联记录（Dynamic Related Records）功能使代理能够在上下文侧面板中快速查看关联记录，而无需切换标签页。这个功能提高了工作效率，使代理可以在单一界面中访问所需的所有信息。

questions.question: With the Auto Close Resolved Cases flow enabled, and using its default settings, whenwill a reminder be sent to a non-responsive customer0
questions.explanation: 启用自动关闭已解决案例流并使用默认设置时，系统将在5天后向无响应的客户发送提醒。这个时间间隔给予客户充足的时间来回应，同时也确保了案例不会无限期地保持打开状态。

questions.question: The self-registration feature enables new customer contacts to submit registrationrequests from the customer portal. Which role is responsible for creating the unique registration code for each account?
questions.explanation: 系统管理员（System administrator）角色负责为每个账户创建唯一的注册代码。这确保了注册过程由具有最高权限和安全责任的人员管理，有利于维护系统的完整性和安全性。

questions.question: What action is required to enable agents to create an incident record for a case?

options.text: They must be assigned with the read role for incident
They must be assigned with the itil role
They must be assigned with the snc_intemal role
They must be assigned with the sn_customerservice.itsm_contributor role

questions.explanation: 要使代理能够为案例创建事件（Incident）记录，他们必须被分配ITIL角色。这个角色提供了必要的权限来访问事件管理功能，并允许代理在需要时从客户服务案例创建相关的IT服务管理事件。

questions.question: In the 'Action Status' column on a case list what could a red indicator dot mean? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 案例列表中的红色指示点可能表示两种情况：案例被内部和客户同时阻止（Blocked internally and by customer），或仅被内部阻止（Blocked internally）。这些指示帮助代理快速识别需要注意的案例问题。

questions.question: Which of the following are correct for parent/child synchronization? (Choose two.)

options.text: Multiple child cases can be managed from a parent case as in Major Issue Management
The Administrator can choose which fields to synchronize from parent to child cases
Parent to child cases can be synchronized regardless of which state the case is in
The property to synchronize parent to child cases is automatically enabled

questions.explanation: 关于父子案例同步的正确说法包括：多个子案例可以从一个父案例进行管理，就像在重大问题管理中一样，这支持复杂的案例层次结构；管理员可以选择哪些字段从父案例同步到子案例，提供了配置的灵活性。这两个特性是父子同步功能的关键。

questions.question: When the channel field on a case form is set to Social where are details of the socialmedia conversations related to the case stored?
questions.explanation: 当案例的渠道字段设置为社交媒体时，相关的社交媒体对话详情存储在社交日志（Social Logs）中。这些日志记录了所有通过社交媒体渠道的交互，为代理提供了完整的沟通历史和背景信息。

questions.question: Once a major case candidate is approved a major case is created. What then happensto the customer case?

options.text: The customer case becomes a child case of the major case
The customer case will be automatically closed
The customer case becomes the parent case of the major case
The customer case will automatically be related to a problem

questions.explanation: 当重大案例候选被批准并创建重大案例时，原始的客户案例成为重大案例的子案例。这个关系使得所有相关的客户案例都可以在单一的重大案例管理界面中进行协调和监控，提高了案例管理的效率。

questions.question: What are the types of units used to measure entitlements? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 用于衡量权利的单位类型包括：小时（Hours）用于基于时间的支持权利，如SLA时间或服务小时；案例（Case）用于基于案例数量的权利限制。这两种衡量方式覆盖了不同的客户服务需求。

questions.question: How are ServiceNow's out-of-the-box Customer Service Management applicationspackaged? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: ServiceNow的开箱即用客户服务管理应用通过两种方式打包：应用商店应用（Store Apps）和插件（Plugins）。应用商店应用提供了完整的功能包，而插件允许进一步的定制和扩展。

questions.question: Which of the following statements is correct regarding product models in CSM?

options.text: Products models can only contain digital (logical) items
Product models can contain either physical items or digital (logical) items but not both in the same model
Product models can only contain physical items
Product models can contain both physical items and digital (logical) items in the same mode

questions.explanation: 产品模型可以在同一模型中同时包含物理项目和数字（逻辑）项目。这种灵活性允许组织创建代表复杂产品的综合模型，这些产品可能包含硬件和软件的组合，或其他形式的数字资产。

questions.question: Which of the following is correct regarding the create contact (consumer) feature in CSM Workspaces?

options.text: The create contact (consumer) feature is available in all CSM Workspaces
The create contact (consumer) feature is not available in any of the CSM Workspaces
The create contact (consumer) feature is only available in the CSM Configurable Workspace
The create contact (consumer) feature is only available in the Agent Workspace

questions.explanation: 创建联系人（消费者）功能仅在CSM可配置工作区中可用。这个特性专门为可配置工作区设计，允许代理直接在工作区中创建新的消费者记录，而无需离开工作界面。

questions.question: Depending on which CSM workspace you are operating within, certain steps can beapplied to configure the form header. Which of the following is correct regarding formheaders in the CSM Configurable workspace?

options.text: The form header's secondary values can only he displayed above the ribbon components
The form header's primary values can be displayed in the contextual side panes instead of above theribbon components
The form header's secondary values can be displayed in the contextual side panel instead of above theribbon components
The form header for the case form can display five levels of field values from the case table

questions.explanation: 在CSM可配置工作区中，表单头的次要值可以显示在上下文侧面板中，而不是显示在功能区组件上方。这提供了更灵活的表单布局选项，允许定制如何呈现表单信息。

questions.question: User criteria records may be applied to which knowledge items?
questions.explanation: 用户条件记录可以应用于知识库（Knowledge Base）和知识文章（Article）。这两个级别的应用允许系统在不同的粒度上基于用户特征（如客户类型、地区等）来限制知识内容的访问。

questions.question: What are the three main components that make up Proactive Customer Service Operations? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 构成主动客户服务运营的三个主要组成部分是：服务监控（Service Monitoring）用于实时监视系统健康状况；服务感知安装基础（Service-Aware Install Base）用于跟踪客户的产品实例；主动案例（Proactive Case）用于预防性地创建案例来解决潜在问题。这三个组成部分共同构成了主动支持策略。

questions.question: What are the three out-of-the-box playbooks for CSM? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: CSM的三个开箱即用剧本（playbooks）是：入门案例剧本（Case playbook for Onboarding）、产品支持案例剧本（Case playbook for Product Support）和投诉案例剧本（Case playbook for Complaints）。这些剧本为常见的客户服务场景提供预定义的工作流程和最佳实践。

questions.question: Which of the following allows you to install out-of-the-box Customer Service Management applications within your ServiceNow instance? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: 允许安装开箱即用客户服务管理应用的方式有两种：插件（Plugins）和应用商店应用（Store Apps）。这两种安装方法提供了不同的安装体验和功能集，组织可以根据其需求选择合适的方法。

questions.question: What are available matching criteria for case assignment in Customer Service Management? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: 客户服务管理中案例分配的可用匹配条件包括：匹配技能（Matching Skills）确保代理具备处理特定案例所需的知识；已分配案例（Assigned Cases）衡量代理当前的工作负荷；可用性今天（Availability Today）反映代理当天的实时可用性。这三个条件共同优化了案例到代理的匹配过程。

questions.question: To enable agents to collaborate with other agents or Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) in real-time for faster case resolution

options.text: Enables agents to keep information regarding details of the case visible at all times
Enables agents to access response templates to help them resolve cases faster and more efficiently
To enable agents to collaborate with other agents or Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) in real-time for fastercase resolution
Enables managers to discreetly monitor chats between agents and customers

questions.explanation: This question discusses the sidebar feature in CSM Configurable Workspace. The sidebar enables collaborative communication between agents and SMEs, allowing real-time assistance for faster case resolution. Option C correctly identifies this collaborative purpose of the sidebar, distinguishing it from other features like template access or case visibility.

questions.question: What is the specific type of catalog item that allows users to create any type of task, such as cases, from the Service Catalog?
questions.explanation: Record Producer is a specialized catalog item type that enables users to create various types of records (like cases) directly from the Service Catalog without going through a standard request process. It provides a flexible way to generate different record types through a customizable form interface.

questions.question: Which feature sends an email notification containing a list of relevant knowledge articles to the case submitter and watchlist users associated with the case whenever a case is created?
questions.explanation: Auto-Responder is a CSM feature that automatically sends email notifications when a case is created. These notifications include relevant knowledge articles to help the customer or case participants find quick solutions. This is distinct from other features like Trending Topics (analysis feature) or Proactive Customer Service Operations (broader initiative).

questions.question: Depending on the CSM application configurations, cases can be assigned to agents manually or by using auto-assignment. Which routing and assignment features leverage matching rules? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Both Assignment Workbench and Assignment Rules use matching rules to route and assign cases. Assignment Workbench allows manual matching rule-based assignment, while Assignment Rules automate the process. State Flows handle workflow progression, and CSM Workspace is a UI component rather than an assignment mechanism.

questions.question: What does Major Issue Management use to identify all other customers impacted by a major case?
questions.explanation: Major Issue Management uses Recipient Lists to identify and notify all customers affected by a major case. Recipient Lists contain multiple contact records that need to be informed of issues that impact their installed base or service. This is distinct from Account Lists, Customer Product Lists, or Notify Lists.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct regarding the social media channel?

options.text: Cases cannot be created from any of the social channels
Cases are NOT created automatically from any of the social channels
Cases can be created automatically depending on which social channel is used
Cases are created automatically from all of the social channels

questions.explanation: CSM supports integration with social media channels, and cases can be created automatically from certain social channels depending on the configuration. Different social channels have different automation capabilities - some automatically create cases when messages are received, while others require manual intervention. The key point is that behavior varies by channel.

questions.question: When integrating Customer Service Management with IT Service Management, what separate action is required for Request Management?

options.text: Activation of the Customer Service with Service Management plugin (com.sn_cs_sm)
Activation of the Customer Service with Request Management plugin (com.sn_cs_sm_request)
Activation of the Customer Service Case Action Status plugin (com.snc.csm_action_status)
Activation of the Customer Service plugin (com.sn_customerservice)

questions.explanation: To enable integration with IT Service Management Request modules, the specific plugin 'com.sn_cs_sm_request' (Customer Service with Request Management plugin) must be activated separately. This is in addition to the standard CSM with Service Management plugin, allowing Request Management integration.

questions.question: New case tasks use the following prefix:

options.text: No specific task prefix just existing TASK prefix

questions.explanation: Case tasks in CSM use the CSTASK prefix to distinguish them from other task types. This standardized prefix helps identify and filter case-related tasks in the system, making it easier for agents to locate and manage task-specific functionality and reports.

questions.question: When are child cases updated from the parent case?

options.text: Clicking on the Child Sync UI
When the Sync scheduled job runs

questions.explanation: Child cases are updated automatically whenever the parent case is modified. This automatic synchronization ensures that critical information from parent cases (like status, priority, or assignment) immediately reflects in all related child cases without requiring manual intervention or scheduled jobs.

questions.question: Which of the following features are specific to CSM Workspaces and will not be found in the Platform UI view? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: CSM Workspaces include specialized features not available in the standard platform UI: Lookup and Verify enables real-time customer verification against company databases, and Agent Assist provides AI-powered suggestions for resolving cases. These features are workspace-specific enhancements. Special handling notes and Related search are available in both views.

questions.question: Customer service agents can use Agent Assist to search for information from an interaction. By default, what are the available search sources? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Agent Assist defaults to searching three sources: Knowledge articles (self-service resources), Service Catalog (request options), and Communities (peer-to-peer support). While Consumer service portal and Customer service portal can be configured as additional sources, the default configuration focuses on internal knowledge bases and community forums.

questions.question: Entitlements are counted using two types of units:
questions.explanation: CSM Entitlements track customer usage rights using Hours and Cases as the two standard unit types. Hours track time-based support limits (e.g., hours of support included), while Cases track number-based limits (e.g., maximum cases per year). These units help monitor service consumption against customer contracts.

questions.question: Service-aware Install Base consists of which entities? (Choose three.)
questions.explanation: Service-aware Install Base comprises three key entities: Installed Products (actual products deployed at customer sites), Install Base Items (detailed tracking of specific installations), and Sold Products (products sold to customers). Assets and Configuration Items are related but distinct ITSM concepts, not primary Install Base entities.

questions.question: What is the primary output from the Requirements Gathering workshop?
questions.explanation: The Requirements Gathering workshop produces User Stories as its primary output. Stories describe features and requirements from an end-user perspective, defining what users need and why. These stories form the foundation for CSM implementation planning and guide the configuration and customization efforts.

questions.question: What is a limitation regarding synchronization between a case and its associated work order?

options.text: If information changes on the Case form it is not updated on the Work Order form
Updates on a case or work order will only synchronize after the work order is approved
When creating a work order from a case only the Account field on the work order form is filed in but notthe Company field
